author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625

patch.value: Contracts command lookup should handle package namespace roots

The 2026-06-25 source-map audit found that an installed package namespace can expose help at the root command path while pm contracts --command <namespace> reports unknown_command; child command lookup works.

The intended contract behavior for package namespace roots is defined; pm contracts either returns namespace metadata/child-command guidance for roots like changelog or emits a clearer package-namespace error; regression coverage exercises installed package namespace root and child command; pnpm contracts:check and package command discovery tests pass.
Run node dist/cli.js changelog --help, then node dist/cli.js contracts --command changelog --flags-only --json and node dist/cli.js contracts --command "changelog generate" --flags-only --json.
Contracts lookup gives useful namespace-level metadata or a precise guidance error for the package namespace root, while child command lookup remains valid.
Root namespace help exists, but contracts --command changelog returns unknown_command; contracts --command "changelog generate" works.

value.author: codex-pm-ecosystem-audit-20260625
value.text: Duplicate check before create: status-all search for contracts --command changelog unknown_command package root command full path changelog generate found related closed items pm-7etc, pm-4os2/pm-d6kq class work, and pm-zqes class work, but no open direct namespace-root contracts item.

message: Create package namespace contracts tracking issue
